hooks.command: cat | MEMPALACE_PALACE_PATH=$(bash ~/.mempalace/palace_detect.sh) ~/.mempalace/venv/bin/python3 -m mempalace hook run --hook session-start --harness claude-code

bash -c '~/.mempalace/venv/bin/python3 ~/.mempalace/export.py 2>/dev/null; cd ~/.mempalace && git add export/ && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "snapshot $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" && git push origin master 2>/dev/null)'

bash -c 'CWD=$(pwd); if ls "$CWD" 2>/dev/null | grep -qE "^(package\.json|go\.mod|requirements\.txt|Cargo\.toml|pyproject\.toml|build\.gradle|\.git)$"; then if [ ! -d "$CWD/.code-review-graph" ]; then echo "SETUP NEEDED: code-review-graph not initialized in this project. Run: code-review-graph install --platform claude-code && code-review-graph build"; fi; fi'
